summary: Multiplayer AI workspace where teams build and run shared workplace agents.
editor_note: The useful bet is making enterprise AI collaborative instead of a private chat window. Dust gives teams shared agents, Slack/GitHub/Drive connectors, model choice, RBAC, audit logs, and a semantic layer that improves from use. Unlike one-off copilots, the workspace makes agent behavior visible to teammates. The risk is whether agent sprawl becomes the new collaboration tax.
